name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
Dior Groove♣️ 25 Bag 'Large Black Embossed Check'
This Dior Groove 25 bag is a new addition to the 2024 Winter Ready-to-Wear collection, designed by Maria Grazia Chiuri, elegant and stylish. Crafted from black calfskin with embossing, it features a quilted oversized check pattern, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. The leather key pouch is embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with gold-finish stars, unique and distinctive. The zipper lock opens with the included key charm. The spacious compartment features an insert pocket and a zip pocket for daily essentials. With a leather top handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, it can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody, making it an ideal bag for daily looks.
Zipper closure, with a lock engraved with the Christian Dior Paris logo
Leather key pouch embossed with the Christian Dior Paris logo and accented with vintage gold-finish metal stars, with key
Adjustable, detachable leather shoulder strap
Internal zip pocket
Internal insert pocket
Model: 1365
Size: 25 x 19 x 16 cm (L x H x W)
Fits 1 small bag, 1 wallet, 1 mobile phone, 1 card holder, sunglasses, and lipstick
